name: Oatmeal Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 lb medium firm tofu, well drained and mashed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Cream the margarine until smooth.
3. Beat in the sugars until fluffy.
4. Add the mashed tofu and vanilla extract.
5. Sift together the flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt.
6. Mix the sifted dry ingredients into the tofu mixture lightly.
7. Stir in the oats and raisins.
8. Drop rounded portions of the mixture about 1 1/2 inches apart onto a greased cookie sheet.
9. Press each portion gently with a spoon.
10. Bake for 25 minutes, or until lightly browned.
